title: Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#F7F7F7`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
<g transform='translate(150, 120)' fill='#C06C88'>
  <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='20'/>
  <path d='M-20 0 H 20'/>
  <text x='-30' y='-20' font-size='16'>Username</text>
  <text x='0' y='-20' font-size='16'>Password</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(150, 140)' fill='#C06C88'>
  <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='20'/>
  <path d='M-20 0 H 20'/>
  <text x='-30' y='-20' font-size='16'>TOTP Code</text>
  <text x='0' y='-20' font-size='16'>QR Code</text>
</g>
<g transform='translate(150, 250)'>
  <rect x='-100' y='0' width='200' height='40' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7' class='bg-gray-200'/>
  <rect x='-100' y='50' width='200' height='40' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7' class='bg-gray-200'/>
  <text x='-90' y='10' font-size='16' class='text-gray-700'>Query Playground</text>
  <text x='-90' y='70' font-size='16' class='text-gray-700'>Simulation Results</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a secure TOTP library for QR code generation
Must implement a robust query playground with support for multiple authentication flows
Must use React hooks for state management and functional components for structuring the application

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Multi-Factor Authentication with Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Assess the functionality and user experience of the query playground, including simulation results and error handling.
